CustomField.formula: '周' + IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '1', '一', IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '2','二', IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '3','三', IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '4','四', IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '5', '五', IF(TEXT(WEEKDAY( TODAY() ) - 1) = '6','六','天') ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 星期
